Metadata.title: ProNobat — Persian-first WordPress Booking Plugin
Metadata.description: Online appointment scheduling with Jalali calendar, ZarinPal, Kavenegar, and a Persian admin panel. Free and open-source WordPress plugin for Iranian businesses.
Metadata.keywords: WordPress booking plugin, online appointment scheduling Iran, Jalali calendar WordPress, ZarinPal WordPress, Persian WordPress plugin
Metadata.og_title: ProNobat — Online Appointment Scheduling for Iranian Businesses
Metadata.og_description: Jalali calendar, Iranian payment gateways, Persian SMS, and a professional admin panel — all in one WordPress plugin.

Footer.tagline: Online Appointment Scheduling for Iranian Businesses

Hero.subheadline: Jalali calendar, Iranian payment gateways, Persian SMS, and a professional admin panel — all in one WordPress plugin.

FeatureGrid.title: Everything You Need for Appointments
FeatureGrid.subtitle: From Jalali calendar to payment gateways — built for Iranian businesses.
FeatureGrid.jalali_desc: All dates in Solar Hijri, Persian digits, and Iranian public holidays automatically.
FeatureGrid.payment_desc: Integration with ZarinPal, IDPay, and NextPay with server-to-server verification.
FeatureGrid.sms_desc: Auto-send confirmations and reminders via Kavenegar, Melipayamak, and IPPanel.
FeatureGrid.reports_desc: Revenue dashboard, appointment stats, staff performance, and capacity forecasting.
FeatureGrid.staff_desc: Working hours, days off, individual pricing, and personal booking links.
FeatureGrid.recurring_desc: Create weekly or monthly appointment series with RRULE and bulk cancellation.

HowItWorks.title: Set Up in Three Steps
HowItWorks.install_desc: Download from the WordPress repository or upload the ZIP file. No complex configuration needed.
HowItWorks.configure_desc: Set up services, working hours, and payment gateways from the WordPress admin panel.
HowItWorks.receive_desc: Place the shortcode on any page. Customers book online and you receive a notification.

DemoCtaBanner.title: Try ProNobat Right Now
DemoCtaBanner.description: A fully functional live demo with real data — no installation required.

Testimonials.title: Iranian Businesses Trust ProNobat
Testimonials.t1_quote: Since installing ProNobat, the phone no longer rings for reservations. Customers book online themselves and receive a confirmation SMS.
Testimonials.t2_quote: The ZarinPal integration works great. My sessions are paid before the appointment and late cancellations have dropped significantly.
Testimonials.t3_quote: I set up the Jalali calendar and working hours in less than an hour. Best booking plugin for WordPress in Iran.

FAQ.title: Answers to Your Questions
FAQ.free_a: Yes, ProNobat is open-source and free. The full code is available on GitHub with no subscription fees.
FAQ.wordpress_version_q: What is the minimum WordPress version required?
FAQ.wordpress_version_a: ProNobat requires WordPress 6.0 or higher and PHP 8.1 or higher.
FAQ.payment_gateways_a: ZarinPal, IDPay, and NextPay with sandbox/live modes. Refunds are handled from the admin panel.
FAQ.jalali_q: Is the calendar fully in Jalali?
FAQ.jalali_a: Yes. All dates, date pickers, reports, and reminders are displayed in Solar Hijri with Persian digits.
FAQ.recurring_q: Can I set up weekly recurring appointments?
FAQ.recurring_a: Yes. Recurring appointments are supported with the RRULE standard — weekly, monthly, or annually. You can cancel the entire series or a single appointment.
FAQ.gdpr_q: Is it compliant with privacy regulations?
FAQ.gdpr_a: Yes. Customer data can be anonymized and exported as JSON. Data retention period is configurable.
FAQ.elementor_a: Yes. An Elementor widget and a Gutenberg block are included with the plugin. You can also use the shortcode in any page builder.
FAQ.support_a: Support is provided through the GitHub repository (Issues). Complete documentation and step-by-step guides are available on this site.

LandingDashboard.title: Everything at a Glance
LandingDashboard.description: The ProNobat dashboard shows the daily state of your business on a single screen. From today's appointments to monthly revenue — no separate reports needed.
LandingDashboard.bullet_1: Status cards for confirmed, pending, and cancelled appointments
LandingDashboard.bullet_2: Revenue chart for 7, 30, and 90 days with automatic Jalali conversion
LandingDashboard.bullet_3: Today's appointments table with quick status change
LandingDashboard.bullet_4: Per-staff performance summary for the current day

LandingBookingWizard.title: Smooth Booking Experience for Customers
LandingBookingWizard.description: The booking form is a multi-step wizard that guides the customer from selecting a service to payment — no registration required.
LandingBookingWizard.bullet_1: Choose service, staff, and time in three simple steps
LandingBookingWizard.bullet_2: Jalali calendar with real-time available slot display
LandingBookingWizard.bullet_3: Inline payment with ZarinPal, IDPay, or NextPay
LandingBookingWizard.bullet_4: Instant SMS confirmation after successful booking

LandingPayments.title: Iranian Payment Gateways Ready to Use
LandingPayments.description: ProNobat integrates with three trusted Iranian payment gateways. Payment verification is server-to-server — no client-reported data is trusted.
LandingPayments.bullet_1: ZarinPal with Sandbox mode for cost-free testing
LandingPayments.bullet_2: IDPay with refund support from the admin panel
LandingPayments.bullet_3: NextPay for businesses that need more flexibility
LandingPayments.bullet_4: Full transaction log with reference numbers and status

LandingSms.title: Automatic Persian SMS Notifications
LandingSms.description: ProNobat integrates with three Iranian SMS providers. Confirmations, reminders, and cancellation alerts are sent automatically with a full delivery log.
LandingSms.bullet_1: Kavenegar, Melipayamak, and IPPanel — your choice
LandingSms.bullet_3: Daily send cap respected and customer opt-out checked
LandingSms.bullet_4: Full SMS log with delivery status for each message

LandingReports.title: Your Business Data in Persian
LandingReports.description: Financial and operational reports in Jalali calendar with Persian digits and CSV export for accounting. Everything you need for informed decisions.
LandingReports.bullet_1: Daily, weekly, and monthly revenue charts in Toman
LandingReports.bullet_2: Per-staff performance: appointment count, revenue, cancellation rate
LandingReports.bullet_3: Capacity forecasting based on historical trends
LandingReports.bullet_4: Full CSV export of all data for external reporting

FeaturesPage.meta_title: ProNobat Features — Complete WordPress Booking Plugin Capabilities
FeaturesPage.meta_description: Full list of 41 ProNobat features: Jalali calendar, Iranian payment gateways, Persian SMS, Google Calendar, REST API, and more.
FeaturesPage.title: All ProNobat Features at a Glance
FeaturesPage.subtitle: From Jalali calendar to the developer API — everything you need for professional appointment scheduling.
FeaturesPage.jalali_calendar_desc: All dates, pickers, and reports in Solar Hijri with Persian digits and Iranian public holidays.
FeaturesPage.multi_service_desc: Define unlimited services with independent duration, price, color, and capacity per service.
FeaturesPage.multi_staff_desc: Each staff member has independent working hours, days off, services, and a personal booking link.
FeaturesPage.working_hours_desc: Define weekly working hours per staff member with timezone support.
FeaturesPage.buffer_time_desc: Set a mandatory gap between consecutive appointments for preparation time.
FeaturesPage.appointment_capacity_desc: Set max customers per time slot for classes and group sessions.
FeaturesPage.service_duration_desc: Define precise service duration from 5 minutes to several hours with configurable steps.
FeaturesPage.customer_management_desc: Full customer profile with appointment history, contact info, and SMS settings.
FeaturesPage.appointment_statuses_desc: Five statuses: confirmed, pending_payment, pending_confirmation, completed, cancelled — color-coded.
FeaturesPage.zarinpal_desc: Full ZarinPal API integration with Sandbox mode and server-to-server verification.
FeaturesPage.idpay_desc: Payment and refunds via IDPay with a full transaction log from the admin panel.
FeaturesPage.nextpay_desc: NextPay integration for businesses that need more flexibility.
FeaturesPage.server_side_verify_desc: No payment status is accepted from the client; all confirmations happen server-side.
FeaturesPage.refunds_desc: Request refunds directly from the admin panel without accessing the gateway dashboard.
FeaturesPage.payment_log_desc: Every transaction's reference number, amount, status, and timestamp stored in the database.
FeaturesPage.sandbox_mode_desc: Test the full payment flow without real money using ZarinPal's sandbox.
FeaturesPage.kavenegar_desc: Send confirmations, reminders, and cancellation alerts via Kavenegar API with OTP templates.
FeaturesPage.melipayamak_desc: Melipayamak integration supporting both token and username/password authentication.
FeaturesPage.ippanel_desc: Send SMS via IPPanel with configurable sender line and access key.
FeaturesPage.email_notifications_desc: Send confirmation and reminder emails via WP Mail with customizable templates.
FeaturesPage.sms_opt_out_desc: Checks each customer's opt-out setting before sending; privacy respected.
FeaturesPage.daily_sms_cap_desc: Set a maximum number of outgoing SMS messages per day to control costs.
FeaturesPage.notification_log_desc: All sent SMS and emails logged with delivery status and message content.
FeaturesPage.reminder_cron_desc: WP-Cron runs daily and sends 24-hour advance reminders for tomorrow's appointments.
FeaturesPage.jalali_datepicker_desc: Interactive Solar Hijri calendar in the customer booking form showing available slots.
FeaturesPage.staff_calendar_view_desc: View each staff member's weekly schedule as a calendar from the admin panel.
FeaturesPage.availability_blocking_desc: Manually block time ranges from the admin to prevent new bookings.
FeaturesPage.google_calendar_sync_desc: Staff members connect their Google Calendar; its events block availability via freebusy.
FeaturesPage.ics_export_desc: Download an ICS file to add appointments to any calendar app (Apple, Outlook, Google).
FeaturesPage.recurring_appointments_desc: Create weekly/monthly appointment series with RRULE; cancel individually or the entire series.
FeaturesPage.gutenberg_block_desc: Dedicated ProNobat block in the WordPress block editor with a sidebar settings panel.
FeaturesPage.elementor_widget_desc: Drag-and-drop widget in Elementor with pre-selected service and staff options.
FeaturesPage.shortcode_desc: Use [pronobat_booking] in any page builder or theme with optional parameters.
FeaturesPage.rest_api_desc: Complete endpoint set for appointments, customers, services, and settings with rate limiting.
FeaturesPage.wp_roles_desc: Custom pronobat_* capabilities assignable to any custom role.
FeaturesPage.psr4_autoload_desc: Clean PHP with PSR-4 autoloading, full namespacing, and PHPStan Level 6 compliance.
FeaturesPage.hooks_filters_desc: Documented actions and filters to customize every aspect of the plugin without editing core code.
FeaturesPage.custom_gateway_interface_desc: Implement PaymentGatewayInterface to add any custom payment gateway.
FeaturesPage.rate_limiting_desc: 10 req/min/IP for public routes and 3 req/min/IP for booking creation endpoints.
FeaturesPage.gdpr_tools_desc: Anonymize customer data, export as JSON, and configure data retention periods.
FeaturesPage.phpstan_level6_desc: Entire codebase passes PHPStan Level 6 with no errors; Level 8 in the final phase.
FeaturesPage.i18n_ready_desc: .pot/.po/.mo files for translation; full WPML and Polylang compatibility.

HowItWorksPage.meta_title: How It Works — ProNobat Installation & Setup Guide
HowItWorksPage.meta_description: Step-by-step guide to installing the ProNobat booking plugin in WordPress, configuring services, and receiving your first online appointment.
HowItWorksPage.title: From Installation to First Booking in 5 Steps
HowItWorksPage.subtitle: Simple install, quick setup, immediate start — no coding required.
HowItWorksPage.step1_desc: Search for ProNobat in the official WordPress repository and install it, or upload the ZIP file directly. After activation, the setup wizard opens.
HowItWorksPage.step2_desc: The 4-step wizard configures your business name, timezone, default payment gateway, and SMS settings.
HowItWorksPage.step2_detail2: Choose payment gateway: ZarinPal, IDPay, or NextPay
HowItWorksPage.step2_detail3: Choose SMS provider and enter your API key
HowItWorksPage.step2_detail4: Set default working hours for all staff
HowItWorksPage.step3_desc: From the ProNobat menu in the admin panel, add your services and staff. Each combination can have independent pricing and duration.
HowItWorksPage.step3_detail1: Create at least one service with a name, duration, and price
HowItWorksPage.step3_detail2: Create at least one staff member and assign services
HowItWorksPage.step3_detail3: Set daily working hours for each staff member
HowItWorksPage.step3_detail4: Optional: configure days off and blocked time ranges
HowItWorksPage.step4_title: Place the Booking Form on Your Site
HowItWorksPage.step4_desc: Add the [pronobat_booking] shortcode to any page, post, or widget. Or use the Gutenberg block or Elementor widget.
HowItWorksPage.step4_note: You can pre-select service or staff using service_id or staff_id attributes.
HowItWorksPage.step5_desc: The customer fills out the form, completes payment, and receives an SMS confirmation. You receive an email or SMS notification too.
HowItWorksPage.step5_note: Use the pronobat_appointment_confirmed hook to add custom notifications.

GuidesPage.meta_description: Step-by-step guides for setting up ProNobat: payments, SMS notifications, Google Calendar, and more.
GuidesPage.title: ProNobat Guides
GuidesPage.subtitle: Practical, step-by-step tutorials for real-world scenarios — from payment setup to Google Calendar sync.
